title: Bitcoin price stays under $77K as US bond yields near 20-year highs
summary: BTC price stayed pinned below $77,000 amid rising US bond yields and oil prices, with market analysts saying Bitcoin is now at a "crucial level of support."

title: Stocks Fall as Fed-Hike Anxiety Lifts Bond Yields: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street’s crowded chipmaker trade continued to unravel, dragging down stocks on speculation that a surge from this year’s lows has gone too far amid war-fueled inflation risks that are boosting bond yields.

title: People Are More Willing to Lie to AI Than Humans, Study Finds
summary: Consumers feel less social pressure when lying to an AI chatbot, research finds, while human-like social cues reduce dishonest behavior.
